law: You can use any dataset of your choice to train this model.
The following dataset works well for this purpose: Please note that Apple does not own the copyright to this dataset nor makes any representations about the applicable terms of use for this dataset.
If you choose to use this dataset, the sample includes a script that downloads the dataset from that location and pass it as input to the model.
Before you run the sample code project in Xcode: Make sure your Mac is running macOS 10.15 or later.
Make sure you are running Xcode 11 or later.
Use an MPS neural network graph to train a simple neural network digit classifier.
